title: Proteomics for systems toxicology.
author: Titz B Elamin A Martin F Schneider T Dijon S Ivanov NV Hoeng J Peitsch MC
content: S-EPMC4212285 PMC4212285 Proteomics for systems toxicology. Current toxicology studies frequently lack measurements at molecular resolution to enable a more mechanism-based and predictive toxicological assessment.
